customer_anxiety_profile: Low anxiety, high cooperativeness. Frederick is an informed, long-tenured solar researcher who frames his interest as exploratory. No scam skepticism, no price resistance, no hostility. His primary orientation is information-gathering, not urgency.
unresolved_concerns: Frederick's adult daughter and son are on the title — neither was confirmed for the appointment and their role in the decision is unknown.
Wife participated in scheduling (ruled out Tuesday, selected Wednesday) but was never explicitly confirmed as a participant on the Wednesday appointment.
Frederick may be expecting an in-person visit ('stop by' language at 06:50) rather than a phone call — the closer should clarify the format at the top of the call.
sensitive_topics_raised: Dual 200-amp service / high consumption household — Frederick volunteered this as context for their usage; the closer should treat it as a qualification signal, not a complication.
Bill variability ($300–$600 range, $620 peak this month) — Frederick mentioned this matter-of-factly; the closer has a natural anchor here.
exact_promises_rep_made: Appointment confirmed for Wednesday the 5th at 2:30 PM.
Text confirmation to be sent to (804) 761-1326 with day and time.
